scripts.docker:clean-cache: docker compose -f docker-compose.local.yml --env-file .env.local exec admin-frontend rm -rf /app/apps/admin-frontend/.next && docker compose -f docker-compose.local.yml --env-file .env.local exec public-frontend rm -rf /app/apps/public-frontend/.next
scripts.docker:caddy:reset: docker compose -f docker-compose.local.yml --env-file .env.local stop caddy && docker compose -f docker-compose.local.yml --env-file .env.local rm -f caddy && docker volume rm -f cppms_caddy_data cppms_caddy_config && docker compose -f docker-compose.local.yml --env-file .env.local up -d caddy
scripts.docker:caddy:reset:prod: docker compose -f docker-compose.prod.yml --env-file .env stop caddy && docker compose -f docker-compose.prod.yml --env-file .env rm -f caddy && docker volume rm -f cppms_caddy_data cppms_caddy_config && docker compose -f docker-compose.prod.yml --env-file .env up -d caddy
scripts.seed:dev:docker: docker compose -f docker-compose.local.yml --env-file .env.local exec -e POCKETBASE_INTERNAL_URL=http://pocketbase:8090 admin-frontend bun --env-file /app/.env.local /app/packages/pocketbase/scripts/seed-dev.ts
scripts.seed:dev:docker:force: docker compose -f docker-compose.local.yml --env-file .env.local exec -e POCKETBASE_INTERNAL_URL=http://pocketbase:8090 admin-frontend bun --env-file /app/.env.local /app/packages/pocketbase/scripts/seed-dev.ts --force
